_note: Data scraped from https://seanwilliam2077.wixsite.com/my-site-1 (via Wix editor) on 2026-07-18. Image URLs: https://static.wixstatic.com/media/<id>. Video URLs: https://<path>.

projects.name: Wolf Soga
projects.intro: Team project of 5 people, developed with 4 3D artists. ARPG where the player fights monsters and explores the world.
coreSystems: Third-person combat: dodge, run, melee attack, magic attack, parry, falling, respawn
Enemy behavior: melee/range/magic attack, final boss battle
Item system: level up, HP/attack, random pickups
UI system: tutorial hints, interactive UI
projects.enemyLogic: 4 enemy types: melee (patrol, weapon pickup, spinning attack/smash/jump/thunder), range (shoot + take cover under 30% HP), magic (5 attacks incl. teleport + self-heal), boss (9 attacks incl. 50s CD ult, teleport axe throw, melee combos)

projects.name: RPG Parkour System
projects.intro: Built a parkour system in Unreal for ARPG and used all mechanics to build a playable level.
functions: Slide (slope momentum + auto crouch under ceiling)
Grab Edge (move along edges, jump between)
Cover (move along wall, jump between walls)
AI enemy see/hear/hurt perception + NPC branching dialogue

projects.name: City Of Sorrow
projects.intro: 3D ARPG set in a mysterious medieval fantasy world; the player saves a castle shrouded by dark forces. First game; 12 monster types with varied AI (archer standing, melee tap/continuous random attack, mixed range/melee elites), level-name triggers, shortcut elevators. C# in Unity. Art assets from online resources.

projects.name: Let Me Out
projects.devTime: 2 Days (Global Game Jam 2024, theme: Make Us Laugh)
projects.intro: 2D text deciphering game in pixel style telling a funny story in a hospital ward, made for 2024 GGJ.

projects.name: ROI Journey
projects.intro: 2D platformer focused on exploration and emotional expression. A boy named Roi, after a tragic childhood, journeys toward the city — a story of revelation and healing across 5 scenes: dark forest, ruined sky city, desert, colorful jungle (meets squirrel friend), colorful city ending with the goddess of Victory.

projects.name: Cyber Shoot (VR)
projects.intro: VR FPS set in the future where domestic robots turn on humans. Sci-fi combat with a Bullet Time mechanic: grab enemy bullets mid-air or dodge them; skill CD shown on right-hand orange circle.
